query:
SELECT 
  segment,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(lastVisitDate) as earliest_visit,
  MAX(lastVisitDate) as latest_visit
FROM customers 
WHERE lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY segment;
command:

  segment,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(lastVisitDate) as earliest_visit,
  MAX(lastVisitDate) as latest_visit
FROM customers 
WHERE lastVisitDate >= '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY segment;
